wo-ssot-intent.title: [S1-3] Intent Unification (Transaction Processor)
wo-ssot-intent.instruction_raw: Refactor TransactionProcessor handlers to use SettlementSystem.process_transfer() exclusively for all balance mutations. Remove logic duplication between handlers and systems. MANDATORY: Ignore test regressions. Focus on Intent Unification.

wo-ssot-cleanup.title: [S1-4] Orchestration Cleanup
wo-ssot-cleanup.instruction_raw: Delete redundant Phase_MonetaryProcessing (4.7). Remove ledger-processing logic from Phase3_Transaction to ensure side-effects are only handled by the Transaction Authority. MANDATORY: Ignore test regressions. Focus on Orchestration Cleanup.

wo-firm-factory-tests.title: [S2-3] FirmFactory Test & Fixture Overhaul
wo-firm-factory-tests.instruction_raw: Refactor all 20+ test call sites and fixtures to remove the 'simulation' God Object dependency. Align test factories with the new IFirmFactory protocol (agent_registry, world_state injection).
